# Entity Model

## Domain Entities

### Recipe

Top-level automation definition.

| Field | Type | Required | Description |
|-------|------|----------|-------------|
| Name | string | Yes | Recipe identifier |
| Devices | []Device | No | Connected device instances |
| Rules | []Rule | No | Automation rules |

### Device

A configured device instance within a recipe.

| Field | Type | Required | Description |
|-------|------|----------|-------------|
| Name | string | Yes | Instance name (unique within recipe) |
| Type | string | Yes | Driver type (e.g., hue_bulb, smart_plug) |
| Params | map[string]string | No | Driver-specific parameters |
| Options | map[string]string | No | Runtime options |

### Rule

An automation rule linking triggers to actions.

| Field | Type | Required | Description |
|-------|------|----------|-------------|
| Name | string | Yes | Rule identifier |
| When | Trigger | Yes | Primary trigger condition |
| Then | []Action | Yes | Actions to execute |
| Unless | *Trigger | No | Cancel condition (parsed but not evaluated) |

### Trigger

An event condition that activates a rule.

| Field | Type | Required | Description |
|-------|------|----------|-------------|
| Device | string | Yes | Source device name |
| Event | string | Yes | Event name to listen for |
| Params | map[string]string | No | Event parameters |

### Action

An operation performed when a rule fires.

| Field | Type | Required | Description |
|-------|------|----------|-------------|
| Device | string | Yes | Target device name |
| Do | string | Yes | Action command |
| Params | map[string]string | No | Action parameters |
| Delay | string | No | Delay before execution (parsed but not implemented) |

## Supported Device Types

| Type | Description | Protocol |
|------|-------------|----------|
| hue_bulb | Philips Hue colour bulb | Local bridge API |
| smart_plug | Generic smart plug | Local REST |
| motion_sensor | PIR motion sensor | MQTT |
| thermostat | Smart thermostat | ecobee / Nest local API |
| virtual_clock | Software clock trigger | Internal |
| webhook | Outbound HTTP webhook | HTTP |
| scene | Logical scene group | Internal |

## Value Objects

### Params / Options

- Type: `map[string]string`
- All values are strings
- Numeric values (level, kelvin, etc.) require runtime coercion by device drivers

## Relationships

```
Recipe
  ├── 1..* Device
  └── 1..* Rule
         ├── 1 Trigger (When)
         ├── 0..1 Trigger (Unless)
         └── 1..* Action
```
